title: Luffy Protects His Crew
description: After the Davy Back Fight, the crew regroups on Long Ring Long Land and the strange calm before a new threat arrives.
scene: Across pages 16, 17, 18, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. After the Davy Back Fight, the crew regroups on Long Ring Long Land and the strange calm before a new threat arrives.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Let's see... These must be your friends?!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What do you have? That cheese again?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Was he there the whole time?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's what we were asking you!!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I thought you were a tree.

summary: After the Davy Back Fight, the crew regroups on Long Ring Long Land and the strange calm before a new threat arrives.
